title: adhatoda wynaadensis
intro: Adhatoda wynaadensis, also known as Vana Tulsi or Nilgiri Tulsi, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Adhatoda wynaadensis include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve pain. In traditional medicine, Adhatoda wynaadensis is used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used to treat respiratory and fever-related conditions.
